# Pull Request

## 📝 Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## 🔗 Related Issue
Closes #(issue number)

## 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement

## 🔐 Security & Permissions
- [ ] No changes to `permissions`, `host_permissions`, or `web_accessible_resources`
- [ ] If permissions changed: updated `docs/adr/ADR-0002-permissions.md` and `docs/security/permissions.md`
- [ ] MV3 constraints reviewed (service worker, CSP, no remote code)

## ✅ Testing Checklist
- [ ] Math formulas (inline + block)
- [ ] Tables with formulas
- [ ] Code blocks (multiple languages)
- [ ] Streaming messages
- [ ] Click-to-copy individual formulas
- [ ] Word count accuracy (CJK + Latin)
- [ ] Re-render panel
- [ ] Works on ChatGPT
- [ ] Works on Gemini (if applicable)

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots showing the change.

## 📋 Additional Notes
Any additional information or context.

## 🔍 Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (CHANGELOG.md, README.md, docs/spec if needed)
- [ ] My changes generate no new TypeScript errors
- [ ] I have used `logger` instead of `console.log` for debugging
